service_packages.name: Essential EP Production (3-Track)
service_packages.description: Full-service production for a 3-song EP including recording, mixing, and mastering. Ideal for independent artists preparing a first release.
service_packages.delivery_timeframe: 4–6 weeks from project start, depending on artist availability.
service_packages.notes: Up to 8 hours of studio recording time included across 2 days.

service_packages.name: Premium EP Production (3–5 Tracks)
service_packages.description: Expanded EP package with creative direction, vocal production, recording, mixing, and mastering for up to 5 songs.
service_packages.notes: Includes 2 half-day writing sessions and up to 16 hours of recording.

service_packages.name: Deluxe EP / Short Album (4–7 Tracks)
service_packages.description: For artists aiming for a campaign-ready EP or short album, with full production, mixing, mastering, and pre-release consulting.
service_packages.notes: Includes arrangement support and vocal comping across all tracks.

service_packages.name: Radio-Ready Single Production
service_packages.description: Concept development, recording, mixing, and mastering for one commercially competitive single.
service_packages.notes: Perfect for lead singles, sync pitches, or playlist-focused releases.

service_packages.name: Remote Mixing – Basic
service_packages.description: Professional stereo mix for up to 32 tracks of audio, delivered remotely.
service_packages.notes: Stereo stems or multitrack required; vocal tuning not included.

service_packages.name: Remote Mixing – Premium
service_packages.description: Detailed mix service including vocal tuning, editing, and basic stem mastering.
service_packages.notes: Ideal for singles needing radio or playlist-ready polish.

service_packages.name: Stereo Mastering – Single
service_packages.description: Stereo mastering for one song, including streaming-optimized and high-resolution deliverables.
service_packages.notes: Includes loudness-optimized versions for major platforms.

service_packages.name: Full Album Production (8–12 Tracks)
service_packages.description: Concept-to-delivery album production including songwriting support, recording, mixing, and mastering.
service_packages.delivery_timeframe: 12–20 weeks depending on scope and schedule.
service_packages.notes: Designed for label releases and ambitious independent projects.

service_packages.name: Full-Service Audio for Brand Campaigns
service_packages.description: Concept development, music production, voiceover recording, mixing, and mastering for multi-asset brand and advertising campaigns.
service_packages.delivery_timeframe: 4–10 weeks depending on asset count and approvals.
service_packages.notes: Includes usage consultation and deliverables optimized for TV, web, and social.

service_packages.name: Artist Demo Day – 2 Songs
service_packages.description: One-day package to record and rough-mix up to 2 demo songs.
service_packages.notes: Not intended for commercial release; mastering not included.

service_packages.name: Podcast Full-Service Production (Per Episode)
service_packages.description: Recording, editing, mixing, and basic mastering for spoken-word podcast episodes.
service_packages.notes: Includes noise reduction and loudness normalization for podcast platforms.

service_packages.name: EP Mixing & Mastering Only (3–5 Tracks)
service_packages.description: For artists who already have recordings and need professional mixing and mastering for their EP.
service_packages.delivery_timeframe: 3–5 weeks depending on track count and revisions.
service_packages.notes: Remote delivery only; recording must be completed before booking.

case_studies.title: Aurora Cola – "Night Pulse" Global Launch Campaign
case_studies.campaign_type: global brand campaign, TV & online advertising
case_studies.description: Full audio branding and music production for Aurora Cola's "Night Pulse" launch, spanning TVCs, social cutdowns, and in-store activations. We created a driving electronic motif and tailored it into multiple edits including a 30-second hero spot, 15-second cutdowns, vertical social versions, and an extended in-store loop.

case_studies.title: Lumen Headphones – Immersive Sound Launch
case_studies.description: Music direction and production for Lumen's flagship noise-cancelling headphones launch. Deliverables included the main hero track, a percussion-only cut for OOH screens, and a minimal sonic logo treatment for app and web use.

case_studies.title: UrbanRide – City Nights Micro-Campaign
case_studies.description: A fast-turnaround micro-campaign for UrbanRide's city mobility app. We produced three short, high-energy tracks tailored to TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube pre-roll formats, each with tight edit points for user-generated remixes.

case_studies.title: Northline Bank – Sonic Identity Refresh
case_studies.description: Redesigned Northline Bank's sonic identity with a modern, trustworthy sound palette. We delivered a new mnemonic, on-hold music suite, and a series of subtle variations for internal videos and webinars.

case_studies.title: GreenWave – Sustainability Stories Series
case_studies.description: In collaboration with BrightSide Agency, we scored a five-part documentary series highlighting community-led climate initiatives. Each episode received a bespoke hybrid electronic-acoustic score anchored by a shared thematic motif.

case_studies.title: Flow Energy – "Up All Night" Anthem
case_studies.description: High-tempo EDM-inspired anthem for Flow Energy's youth-focused "Up All Night" campaign. Deliverables included a full-length track, 30-second commercial cut, and a bass-heavy festival edit.

case_studies.title: Mira Lane – "Glass Echoes" EP
case_studies.description: End-to-end production for Mira Lane's debut alt-R&B EP "Glass Echoes". We handled songwriting support, vocal production, track production, mixing, and mastering across four songs with a spacious, textured sound.

case_studies.title: Kai Novak – Neo-Soul Sessions
case_studies.description: A series of live-in-studio recordings and performance videos for neo-soul artist Kai Novak. We recorded the band live, mixed and mastered the audio, and prepared stems for live playback.

case_studies.title: Embers in the City – Indie Rock LP
case_studies.description: Full-length indie rock album production featuring gritty guitars and analog synths. We tracked drums and guitars to tape, then mixed and mastered the project for digital and vinyl release.

case_studies.title: Midnight Arcade – "Neon Drifter" Single
case_studies.description: Production and mixing for synthwave single "Neon Drifter", plus three alternate mixes tailored for sync licensing and playlist pitching.

case_studies.title: Oakridge University – Research Voices Podcast
case_studies.description: Ongoing full-service production for Oakridge University's "Research Voices" podcast. We handle recording, editing, mixing, and mastering for a bi-weekly series featuring faculty and guest experts.

case_studies.title: SkyTrail Travel – Brand Refresh Spots
case_studies.description: Produced three warm, cinematic tracks for SkyTrail's brand refresh spots. Each track was adapted into multiple cutdowns for broadcast, online video, and in-flight entertainment.

case_studies.title: Night Shift – Branded Lofi Playlist
case_studies.description: Custom lofi beats playlist for Night Shift Café, designed for both in-store ambience and branded streaming playlists. We produced a suite of short, loopable instrumentals with consistent sonic branding.

case_studies.title: Silverline Records – Debut Rap Artist Development
case_studies.description: Production, mixing, and mastering for a series of debut singles for Silverline's new rap signing. Included A&R support, beat selection, and vocal production across multiple releases.

case_studies.title: Horizon Tech – Product Keynote Sound Design
case_studies.description: Crafted an energetic yet sophisticated sound bed and stings for Horizon Tech's annual product keynote, plus walk-on music for speakers and transition cues for the livestream.

case_studies.title: Lucid Frames – Art House Film Original Score
case_studies.description: Minimal, atmospheric score for the art house film "Lucid Frames". We combined processed field recordings with sparse piano and synth textures across the feature-length project.

testimonials.title: They treated my first EP like a major-label release
testimonials.excerpt: From vocal production to final masters, every detail felt intentional.
testimonials.full_text: As an independent artist releasing my first EP, I was nervous about being taken seriously. The team walked me through every step  pre-production, vocal coaching, mix revisions  and treated the project like a major-label release. The mixes translate perfectly from earbuds to car speakers, and I've already landed playlist placements.

testimonials.title: Live sessions that actually sound like my band
testimonials.excerpt: They captured the feel of our shows better than any studio we've used.
testimonials.full_text: I've done a lot of studio sessions that felt sterile, but this was the opposite. We tracked live in one room and they still managed to get clarity and vibe. The rough mixes already sounded great, and the final masters kept all the dynamics intact. These recordings boosted my live bookings immediately.

testimonials.title: Our synthwave single finally sounds huge
testimonials.excerpt: The mix and master made our track sit right next to our heroes on playlists.
testimonials.full_text: We came in with a dense synth arrangement and too many ideas. They helped us tighten the production, carve out space in the mix, and deliver a master that competes with the big synthwave artists we love. The different alternate mixes have already led to a few sync inquiries.

testimonials.title: A flexible audio toolkit for a global launch
testimonials.excerpt: They delivered a cohesive sonic identity that worked across every market.
testimonials.full_text: Our "Night Pulse" launch required dozens of asset variations across TV, social, and in-store. The studio built a flexible music system and clear stems so our regional partners could cut confidently. The hero track tested extremely well in research, and the sonic logo is already becoming recognizable.

testimonials.title: The soundtrack made our product demo unforgettable
testimonials.excerpt: Their music direction elevated the entire launch film.
testimonials.full_text: We needed a soundtrack that highlighted the clarity of our headphones without distracting from the visuals. They nailed the brief on the first treatment, then dialed in subtle changes for OOH and social assets. View-through rates on the launch film exceeded our benchmarks by a wide margin.

testimonials.title: Fast turnaround without sacrificing quality
testimonials.excerpt: They delivered three distinct cues on an extremely tight timeline.
testimonials.full_text: Our micro-campaign schedule left almost no room for iterations. The team proposed three strong musical directions right away, each tailored to a specific platform. Even with multiple stakeholders, we wrapped approvals ahead of schedule.

testimonials.title: Music that respects the subject matter
testimonials.excerpt: They found a tone that felt emotional without ever being cheesy.
testimonials.full_text: Branded documentaries can easily tip into melodrama, but they helped us avoid that. The score subtly supports the stories without overpowering them. Their communication with our editors was excellent, and revisions were always handled quickly.

testimonials.title: Reliable production support for our ongoing podcast
testimonials.excerpt: They feel like an extension of our internal communications team.
testimonials.full_text: For an academic institution, consistency and clarity are everything. The studio built templates for our intro, outro, and ad reads, and they keep every episode on schedule. Faculty love how easy the recording process feels now.

testimonials.title: A production partner for developing our new rap roster
testimonials.excerpt: They understand how to build a sound for emerging artists.
testimonials.full_text: We needed a studio that could move quickly with singles while still thinking long-term about artist identity. Their producers helped our new signing find a lane sonically, and the first batch of releases is performing above expectations on streaming.

testimonials.title: Analog character with modern punch
testimonials.excerpt: They kept the grit we wanted while still sounding competitive.
testimonials.full_text: We tracked a lot of our album ourselves and were worried about how it would mix. The team embraced the imperfections and turned them into character. The masters hit hard without feeling crushed.

testimonials.title: Quick, affordable mastering that made a real difference
testimonials.excerpt: The track suddenly felt glued together and ready for release.
testimonials.full_text: I booked a single mastering session on a tight budget. Turnaround was fast, the communication was clear, and they even sent a short note about how they approached the low end and loudness. It sounds noticeably better than my DIY attempts.

testimonials.title: Our clients love how polished the episodes sound
testimonials.excerpt: We can focus on content while they handle all the technical work.
testimonials.full_text: As a small agency producing podcasts for clients, we don't have a full in-house audio team. Partnering with this studio has let us pitch more ambitious formats knowing the audio will hold up.

team_members.name: Elena Varga
team_members.bio: Elena specializes in sleek, futuristic electronic production for brands and artists, with a focus on impactful drops and clean low-end for modern streaming platforms.

team_members.name: Marcus Lee
team_members.bio: Marcus builds hard-hitting hip-hop records from the ground up, from beat creation through vocal production for independent and label clients.

team_members.name: Sara Kim
team_members.bio: Sara is a detail-oriented mixing engineer known for clear vocals, punchy drums, and translation across earbuds, cars, and club systems.

team_members.name: Daniel Rojas
team_members.bio: Daniel focuses on loud, dynamic masters that meet platform specs while preserving the emotion of the mix.

team_members.name: Ayesha Patel
team_members.bio: Ayesha coaches performances in the booth, crafts harmonies, and handles vocal comping and tuning for radio-ready toplines.

team_members.name: Luca Martin
team_members.bio: Luca bridges pop sensibilities with modern electronic sound design, often leading music direction for product launches and artist singles.

team_members.name: Chiara Rossi
team_members.bio: Chiara crafts warm, understated lofi and ambient instrumentals for playlists, cafes, and branded environments.

team_members.name: Jordan Smith
team_members.bio: Jordan handles session setup, editing, and file management so producers and artists can stay focused on performance and creativity.

team_members.name: Owen Clark
team_members.bio: Owen oversees scheduling, budgets, and communication, making sure campaigns and EP projects stay on track from inquiry to delivery.
